title: web open --keeplogin-Ns: login session keepalive
desc: Keeps web login session alive using Web Worker timer (not throttled in background tabs). Injects URL after 60s user idle. --keeplogin is the ONLY option name (--idle removed).
steps: Injects JS Web Worker (blob URL) -- setInterval(1s) immune to background tab throttling
Main thread tracks user events (mousemove/click/keydown/scroll) → posts 'activity' to Worker
CDP polls window._kaIdleMs each tick -- if >= 60s → location.href=url injected
Output: # KEEPALIVE url=... interval=Ns idle-threshold=60s pid=...
On inject: # LOGIN-KEEPALIVE url=... idle=Xs ts=...

requirements.expect: lists open Chrome window with KIS URL
requirements.prompt: Implemented as --keeplogin-Ns (Web Worker keepalive). WebCommands.cs commit 0d55a3d3. --idle removed.
Implemented as --keeplogin-Ns (Web Worker keepalive). WebCommands.cs commit 0d55a3d3. --idle removed.
